[{"url": "https://www.yahoo.com/news/nippon-steel-us-steel-sue-202900490.html", "title": "Nippon Steel and US Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger", "content": "U.S. Steel and Japanese steelmaker Nippon Steel sued the U.S. government Monday in a last-ditch effort to move forward with their merger, which President Biden blocked Friday over national security concerns.The new lawsuit accuses Biden of interfering in the merger review process for political gain and to curry favor with the United Steelworkers Union (USW).The companies in a separate lawsuit on Monday alleged the USW illegally colluded with steelmaker Cleveland-Cliffs, which previously tried", "score": 0.8790744, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.cnbc.com/2025/01/06/us-steel-nippon-allege-biden-violated-constitution-in-lawsuit-over-blocked-deal.html", "title": "U.S. Steel, Nippon allege Biden violated constitution in lawsuit over blocked deal", "content": "X
 5401.T-JP

View of the Nippon Steel logo displayed at the entrance of the headquarter building of the Nippon Steel corporation in Tokyo, Japan on January 7, 2025, where Chairman and CEO Eiji Hashimoto held a press conference to explain the lawsuit seeking to invalidate the US Biden presidential order prohibiting the acquisition of US Steel.

David Mareuil | Anadolu | Getty Images", "score": 0.8690161, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://abcnews.com/Business/us-steel-nippon-steel-sue-biden-administration-blocked/story?id=117375339", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger - ABC News", "content": "U.S. Steel and Japan-based Nippon Steel sued the Biden administration on Monday over a decision made last week to block a merger between the two companies.

A proposed acquisition of the second-largest domestic steel producer by Nippon for nearly $15 billion would threaten U.S. national security, the Biden administration said.

The two companies allege in their lawsuit that election-season political considerations undermined formal government review of the merger.", "score": 0.8437023, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://ruralradio.com/kneb-am/abc_news/us-steel-and-nippon-steel-sue-biden-administration-over-blocked-merger-abcid2a70fe0a", "title": "KNEB-AM 960 AM – 100.3 FM - US Steel and Nippon Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger", "content": "A proposed acquisition of the second-largest domestic steel producer by Nippon for nearly $15 billion would threaten U.S. national security, the Biden administration said.

The two companies allege in their lawsuit that election-season political considerations undermined formal government review of the merger.", "score": 0.83549726, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.vcpost.com/articles/128786/20250106/biden-faces-lawsuit-nippon-us-steel-after-blocking-their-15b-merger.htm", "title": "Biden Faces Lawsuit From Nippon, US Steel After Blocking Their $15B Merger", "content": "Nippon Steel and US Steel were supposed to break the industry with a $15 billion merger until outgoing US President Joe Biden blocked the deal over national security concerns.

In response, the two steelmaker giants are suing the Biden administration. The newly filed lawsuit was sent to the US Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia, which claimed that the decision was an obvious politically motivated one, and violated the rights of the companies to due process.", "score": 0.8302782, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://ruralradio.com/rrn/abc_news/us-steel-and-nippon-steel-sue-biden-administration-over-blocked-merger-abcid2a70fe0a", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger - Rural Radio Network", "content": "The two companies allege in their lawsuit that election-season political considerations undermined formal government review of the merger.

The lawsuit in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia alleges that the Biden administration used the government review process as a pretext to reject the merger as a favor to the United Steelworkers (USW) labor union.", "score": 0.8184036, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://abcnews.go.com/Business/us-steel-nippon-steel-sue-biden-administration-blocked/story?id=117375339", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger - ABC News", "content": "Cleveland-Cliffs sought a merger of its own with U.S. Steel, the lawsuit alleges. In the absence of such a merger, Cleveland-Cliffs established an agreement with USW to prevent the acquisition of U.S. Steel by Nippon Steel, the lawsuit claims.

The lawsuit, filed in U.S. District Court for the Western District of Pennsylvania, also names Cleveland-Cliffs CEO Lourenco Goncalves as a defendant for his alleged involvement in the coordinated activity claimed by the suit.", "score": 0.8106142, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.freightwaves.com/news/us-steel-sues-biden-over-blocked-merger-with-nippon", "title": "US Steel sues Biden over blocked merger with Nippon - FreightWaves", "content": "The lawsuit, filed in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit, argues Biden’s  action violated the companies’ right to a fair review.

The suit seeks monetary damages and an injunction against the defendants from “engaging in collusive and anti-competitive behavior.”

Nippon Steel is scheduled to hold a news conference on Tuesday.

In a joint statement released Friday, U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel blasted Biden’s action.", "score": 0.80126834, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.tag24.com/en/politics/politicians/joe-biden/biden-administration-hit-with-lawsuit-from-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-over-blocked-merger-3348695", "title": "Biden administration hit with lawsuit from Nippon Steel and US Steel over blocked merger | TAG24", "content": "They said they had filed their lawsuit "to remedy the ongoing illegal interference with Nippon Steel's acquisition of US Steel."

In the suit, they argued that Biden, who is leaving office on January 20, had improperly used his influence and blocked the deal "for purely political reasons" by ignoring the rule of law to gain favor with workers' unions.

Barron Trump seeks dating and fashion advice from", "score": 0.79561085, "raw_content": null}]

Without closure of the deal, U.S. Steel’s headquarters in Pittsburgh could also be moved, the company said.", "score": 0.66229486, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://khabarasia.com/business/20250106-nippon-steel-and-u-s-steel-sue-biden-administration-over-blocked-merger", "title": "Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel Sue Biden Administration Over Blocked Merger - Khabar Asia", "content": "The proposed acquisition, which would see Nippon Steel integrate U.S. Steel into its operations, has faced opposition from the U.S. government. Under the deal, Nippon Steel would acquire the company for $14.1 billion, which totals to $14.9 billion when including the assumption of U.S. Steel’s debt. As part of the deal, Nippon Steel will invest $1.4 billion in U. S. Steel’s assets and will share technical knowledge, stated Burritt during his keynote address to the 2024 Global Steel Dynamics Forum.

“They’re experts in integrated mills, and they want to invest here,” he said.", "score": 0.82082915, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://gmk.center/en/news/biden-plans-to-block-the-merger-of-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-bloomberg", "title": "Biden plans to block the merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel - Bloomberg", "content": "In early December, Nippon Steel reaffirmed its confidence that the acquisition of US Steel could be completed by the end of 2024 if the deal goes through the proper procedures and is approved by the Biden administration.

As GMK Center reported earlier, Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, according to Reuters, sent a letter to the US President asking him to approve the deal so as not to harm recent efforts to strengthen ties between the two countries.
